_comment: Baseline for audit-text-html-ratio.mjs. Numbers must only DECREASE — this gate is a ratchet. 2026-04-28 update: weekly-employers lowered 70→10 after expanding companyCityFrontalier (5th paragraph on contract clauses), adding a per-page methodology section and two extra FAQ entries (telework + SBFI/SEFRI title equivalence) to build-plugins/weeklyEmployersPlugin.ts. Local partial build showed 80→1 offenders, leaving ample headroom under the new 10 cap; total dropped from 1600→1530 to reflect the same 60-page improvement. Earlier (same day) bumped to absorb the SPA-style job-card refactor (commit affb542cc) which added Tailwind markup to job-listing SEO pages without proportional text content increase. The 830 job-board ceiling is the TEMPORARY pre-fix bound; the commuter-context prose now landed (build-plugins/shared/jobBoardCommuterContext.ts injected into city/sector/type/today/category templates of build-plugins/jobsSeoPagesPlugin.ts) is expected to drive job-board offenders down sharply on the next CI build. After CI rebuilds dist/ with the new helper, run `npm run audit:text-html-ratio:rebaseline` to lock in the new floor and commit the updated baseline; current job-board ceiling stays at 830 only until that next ratchet lands.
